name: Micro SaaS Hackathon
topic: ​Choose a well-known SaaS application (e.g., Notion, Figma, Calendly).Identify a single, core feature within that application that you believe could exist as its own standalone micro-SaaS product.Define the specific problem your micro-SaaS will solve and its target audience.
judging_notes: Focus on practical usefulness, quality of AI integration, and whether the solution addresses a genuine pain point.
